summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TalentOps HRMS new features: US Payroll with state tax, Bulk payroll generation, Dark mode toggle, Calendar integration, and Dashboard analytics charts. All 19 test cases passed. Backend APIs 100% functional, Frontend UI fully operational.
passed_tests: 1. Login page: Google sign-in button NOT present - only email/password form ✓
2. Login as HR (hr@acmecorp.com / password123) - successful login ✓
3. Dashboard: 4 stat cards present (Total Employees, Present Today, Pending Leaves, Open Positions) ✓
4. Dashboard: 4 analytics charts render (Attendance Last 7 Days, Leave Distribution, Payroll Cost Last 6 Months, Recruitment Pipeline) ✓
5. Dashboard: Quick action cards present (Add Employee, Review Leaves, Post a Job) ✓
6. Sidebar: Calendar nav item present and navigable ✓
7. Calendar Page: Month view renders with day grid, summary stats cards (Present/Absent/On Leave/Pending) ✓
8. Calendar Page: Today (April 2) highlighted with blue ring, approved leaves (Apr 10-11) show 'CL' badge ✓
9. Calendar Page: Month navigation buttons work (prev/next/today) ✓
10. Payroll Page: US payroll table with all columns (Employee, Period, State, Gross, Fed Tax, State Tax, SS+Med, Net Pay, Status, Actions) ✓
11. Payroll Page: 'Generate All' bulk button present ✓
12. Payroll Page: 'Generate Payroll' individual button present ✓
13. Payroll Page: US Payroll Calculations info card shows Federal Tax, Social Security, Medicare, State Tax descriptions ✓
14. Payroll Page: PDF download button works (3 buttons found, download triggers) ✓
15. Dark Mode: Theme toggle switches to dark theme (class changes to 'dark') ✓
16. Dark Mode: Theme toggle switches back to light mode ✓
17. Backend API: GET /api/payroll/states returns 51 US states with tax rates (CA=9.3%, TX=0%) ✓
18. Backend API: POST /api/payroll/generate-bulk generates payroll for all employees ✓
19. Backend API: GET /api/dashboard/analytics returns attendance_trend, leave_distribution, payroll_trend, recruitment_pipeline ✓

seed_data_verified.payroll_records: 3 records for John Doe (March, April, June 2026) - CA state, $80k gross, $43.8k net

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: US Payroll with configurable state tax (51 states), bulk payroll generation, dark mode with localStorage persistence (key: talentops-theme), calendar with attendance/leave integration, dashboard analytics with 4 Recharts charts. Payroll records exist for John Doe (March, April, June 2026). Bulk payroll was generated for June 2026.

us_payroll.state_tax_endpoint: GET /api/payroll/states returns 51 states with tax rates
us_payroll.pdf_download: Client-side PDF generation with jsPDF works
us_payroll.table_columns: Employee, Period, State, Gross, Fed Tax, State Tax, SS+Med, Net Pay, Status, Actions

dashboard_analytics.leave_chart: Pie chart - Leave distribution by type

login_page.google_signin_removed: No Google button or 'Or continue with' divider
login_page.demo_accounts: Quick login buttons for Super Admin, HR Admin, Employee
